title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Revvity Singapore PTE Ltd
body: "Application number 5151  Applicant Revvity, Inc. objected to the name used by Revvity Singapore PTE Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 8 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Revvity Singapore PTE Ltd is changed to NI719364, Ltd. "
